_publications._publicationTitle: Impact of MEK Inhibitor Therapy on Neurocognitive Functioning in NF1.

_contextSnippet: The patients on trial NCT02407405 were enrolled based on the severity of their PN and associated pain, disfigurement, and functional limitations. In addition to tumor response, the patients in that study showed clinically meaningful improvement in pain intensity, pain interference, and overall quality of life
details: Patients enrolled based on severity of plexiform neurofibromas showed clinically meaningful improvement in pain intensity, pain interference, and overall quality of life in addition to tumor response. Many cases showed improvement in pain and quality of life earlier in treatment course (within first 12 weeks)
